name: normal-trip
notes: Uninterrupted trip, brief §10 scenario #1. Every consecutive waypoint pair is 25-45m apart (well clear of GpsAnchorTracker's 8.0m noise floor in GpsAnchorTracker.kt), spaced 15s apart, so every fix should land as Outcome.AcceptedMovement and reset CONFIRMED_INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT_MILLIS (3 min) in TripTrackingForegroundService.kt on every single fix. Total elapsed time across all 12 waypoints is 11 x 15s = 165s (2m45s) of continuous simulated driving with zero stalls. Expected result: trip never approaches either stop timer; distanceKm accumulates monotonically; no ConfirmedInactivity or UnstableSignalTimeout stop event should ever fire during this fixture. Route is a straight-line walk up a realistic-looking Cape Town N1-corridor latitude/longitude grid - coordinates are illustrative, not a surveyed road.
